name: robinhood-trading
cli_command: claude mcp add robinhood-trading --transport http https://agent.robinhood.com/mcp/trading

auth.note: Run the CLI command above, then restart Claude Code session to activate

pipeline_steps.step_F: Live price check (price validity gate — all modes)
pipeline_steps.step_8: Fetch actual close prices for post-market review
pipeline_steps.execution: Place real orders (EXECUTION mode only — requires human confirmation first)

project_config.fallback_without_robinhood: WebSearch for approximate prices (less accurate; Step F mitigates risk)

connect.command: claude mcp add robinhood-trading --transport http https://agent.robinhood.com/mcp/trading
connect.status: not registered — run command above then restart Claude Code

safety_gates.EXECUTION_mode_only: Place orders only when active_mode == EXECUTION
safety_gates.human_confirmation: Always display full trade card and await explicit CONFIRM before placing any order
safety_gates.counter_thesis_STRONG_blocks: STRONG counter-thesis rating blocks all order placement
safety_gates.max_drawdown_5pct_halts: Portfolio drawdown >= 5% halts all new orders
